completed_tasks.name: Implement Quota Radar v1.0.0 macOS app

remaining_tasks.name: Start v1.1 release-prep milestone with fresh requirements
Validate GLM quota display in the installed app with real GLM/ZAI credentials
Plan GitHub release and App Store signing/packaging path

blockers.description: GLM real-account validation requires user-provided GLM/ZAI token or environment variables.
blockers.workaround: App shows a provider-level credential error until credentials are configured.

human_actions_pending.action: Provide GLM/ZAI token in App settings or configure ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN and ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL for real-account validation.
human_actions_pending.context: Needed only to verify real GLM quota display; not required for v1.0.0 source/build completion.

decisions.decision: Ship v1.0.0 as a normal Dock app, not a codexU-style floating desktop window.
decisions.rationale: The requested product shape is a standard macOS app with Dock, menu bar, traffic-light controls, and resize behavior.

decisions.decision: Archive v1.0.0 requirements and delete the active REQUIREMENTS.md.
decisions.rationale: complete-milestone expects fresh requirements for the next milestone.

decisions.decision: Keep v1.0.0 tag on the milestone completion commit, not on later pause/handoff commits.
decisions.rationale: The tag should represent the release/milestone state; handoff commits are operational metadata after the release point.

next_action: Run $gsd-new-milestone to define v1.1 Release Prep requirements and roadmap.
context_notes: v1.0.0 is implemented, reviewed, audited, verified, archived, committed, and tagged. The working tree was clean before this pause handoff except ignored build/dist/.DS_Store files.
